name: vibe-workbench
description: Codex integration for Vibe's self-plan, lane, handoff, and verification loop.

interface.shortDescription: Repo-grounded helpers for Vibe bootstrap work.
interface.longDescription: Codex integration for C:\vibe. It packages repo-grounded skills for orientation, self-plan drift checks, lane handoffs, and verification while sharing the same Vibe contract used by the Claude Code plugin.
defaultPrompt: Orient on the Vibe repo and recommend the next slice.
Prepare a Vibe lane handoff with scope and verification.
Run the Vibe Superpowers bridge for the current lane.
